action.content: Write a cover letter for a job in Ventura that is funny and would be enjoyed by someone named Darius, wrap the entire response in double quotation marks.
action.label: context

action.content:
"Dear Darius,

I'm writing to apply for the open position in Ventura because, unlike the rest of the world, I've already mastered the art of finding free ice cream at the beach and navigating the local traffic without getting lost in a sea of palm trees. I heard you're looking for someone who can handle the unique challenges of this area, and I promise to bring a level of enthusiasm that will make even the most stubborn kelp forest look friendly.

My resume might not be as long as yours, but my ability to spot a lost seagull and my knack for turning a Tuesday afternoon into a beach day are unmatched. I'm confident that my combination of professional skills and an unshakeable love for the California coast will make you laugh, learn, and perhaps even reconsider your stance on the best taco spot in town.

Let's grab a drink at a local bar and discuss how I can help your team thrive in the beautiful chaos of Ventura. You've got this, Darius!

Sincerely,
A Ventura Enthusiast"
action.label: response
